errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero
errors.name: AmountMustBeGreaterThanZero

errors.msg: ExpiredAt must be in the future
errors.name: ExpiredAtMustBeInTheFuture

errors.msg: Budget mint must be set when budget amount is nonzero
errors.name: BudgetMintNotSet

errors.msg: Missing required account for funded job
errors.name: MissingRequiredAccount

errors.msg: Hook program must be immutable (upgrade authority must be None)
errors.name: HookProgramIsUpgradeable

errors.msg: Missing hook program account: job declares a hook but hook_program was not supplied
errors.name: MissingHookProgram

errors.msg: Invalid complete_opt_params: must be empty (legacy mode) or [u16 submit_count][...] with submit_count <= remaining_accounts.len()
errors.name: InvalidAutoCompleteParams

docs: Accepts a pending authority nomination, completing ownership transfer.
instructions.name: accept_authority

docs: Whitelists a hook program by creating its `HookWhitelist` PDA. Authority-only.
instructions.name: add_hook_whitelist

docs: Anyone can call — tokens always go to job.client (matches Solidity)
accounts.name: caller

docs: Permissionless refund for expired jobs. Tokens always go to `job.client`.
instructions.name: claim_refund

docs: Optional: required when budget > 0
accounts.name: vault

docs: Optional: required when budget > 0
accounts.name: provider_token_account

docs: Optional: required when budget > 0
accounts.name: treasury_token_account

docs: Optional: required when evaluator_fee_bp > 0 and budget > 0
accounts.name: evaluator_token_account

docs: Evaluator approves a submitted job, distributing escrowed funds.
instructions.name: complete

docs: Optional: must be provided if hook_address is Some
accounts.name: hook_whitelist

docs: Creates a new job in the Open state. Caller becomes the client.
instructions.name: create_job

docs: Optional: required when budget > 0
accounts.name: client_token_account

docs: Optional: required when budget > 0 (init vault for escrow)
accounts.name: vault

docs: or by a whitelisted sub-hook program (multi-hook router). Required when hook is
present and budget > 0. The ACP program approves this PDA as delegate on
client_token_account for budget_amount (F-25 fix).
accounts.name: hook_delegate

docs: using MultiHookRouter -- the delegate is owned by a sub-hook, not the router.
Validated as ["hook_whitelist", delegate_owner] inside approve_hook_delegate.
accounts.name: delegate_whitelist

docs: Escrows tokens from the client into the vault and transitions the job to Funded.
instructions.name: fund

docs: Initializes the global `AcpState` PDA. Caller must be the program's upgrade authority.
instructions.name: initialize

docs: Nominates a new authority (first step of two-step transfer). Authority-only.
instructions.name: nominate_authority

docs: Rejects a job, refunding any escrowed tokens to the client.
instructions.name: reject

docs: Removes a hook program from the whitelist by closing its PDA. Authority-only.
instructions.name: remove_hook_whitelist

docs: Sets the budget amount and payment mint on an Open job. Provider-only.
instructions.name: set_budget

docs: Updates the evaluator fee rate. Authority-only.
instructions.name: set_evaluator_fee

docs: Updates the platform fee rate and treasury address. Authority-only.
instructions.name: set_platform_fee

docs: Assigns a provider to an Open job whose provider is currently unset.
instructions.name: set_provider

docs: Optional: required for auto-complete when budget > 0
accounts.name: vault

docs: Optional: required for auto-complete when budget > 0
accounts.name: provider_token_account

docs: Optional: required for auto-complete when budget > 0
accounts.name: treasury_token_account

docs: or by a whitelisted sub-hook program (multi-hook router). Required when hook is
present and budget > 0. The ACP program approves this PDA as delegate on
provider_hook_token_account for budget_amount (F-25 fix).
accounts.name: hook_delegate

docs: Optional: provider's token account used by the hook for escrow transfer.
Required when hook is present and budget > 0 and evaluator is set.
The ACP approves hook_delegate on this account for budget_amount.
accounts.name: provider_hook_token_account

docs: using MultiHookRouter -- the delegate is owned by a sub-hook, not the router.
accounts.name: delegate_whitelist

docs: Records the provider's deliverable. Auto-completes if no evaluator is set.
F-66: `complete_opt_params` is consumed only on the auto-complete branch
(no evaluator) so the after-Complete and (new) before-Complete hooks
can be given their own opt_params + a distinct slice of
`remaining_accounts`. Empty `complete_opt_params` preserves legacy
behaviour (reuse `opt_params` + full `remaining_accounts` for both
actions). Non-empty `complete_opt_params` enables per-action mode and
is parsed as `[u16 LE submit_account_count][bytes complete opt_params]`.
instructions.name: submit

docs: Global program configuration. Singleton PDA seeded by `["acp_state"]`.
types.name: AcpState

docs: Current program authority; can create/remove hook whitelists and update fees.
fields.name: authority

docs: Nominated successor (two-step transfer). `None` until `nominate_authority` is called.
fields.name: pending_authority

docs: SPL mint accepted for job budgets.
fields.name: payment_token

docs: Wallet that receives platform fees and reclaimed vault rent.
fields.name: platform_treasury

docs: Platform fee in basis points (0-10000). Applied to vault balance on completion.
fields.name: platform_fee_bp

docs: Evaluator fee in basis points (0-10000). Applied on evaluator-confirmed completions.
fields.name: evaluator_fee_bp

docs: Monotonically increasing counter; next job receives this ID.
fields.name: job_counter

docs: PDA bump seed.
fields.name: bump

docs: Emitted when a new authority is nominated (first step of two-step transfer).
types.name: AuthorityNominated

docs: Emitted when a pending authority accepts ownership (second step of two-step transfer).
types.name: AuthorityTransferred

docs: Emitted when the budget is set on a job via `set_budget`.
types.name: BudgetSet

docs: Emitted when the evaluator fee is transferred on evaluator-confirmed completion.
types.name: EvaluatorFeePaid

docs: Emitted when the evaluator fee rate is updated.
types.name: EvaluatorFeeUpdated

docs: Whitelist entry for an approved hook program. PDA seeded by `["hook_whitelist", hook]`.
types.name: HookWhitelist

docs: The whitelisted hook program ID.
fields.name: hook

docs: PDA bump seed.
fields.name: bump

docs: Emitted when a hook program is added to or removed from the whitelist.
types.name: HookWhitelistUpdated

docs: A single job. PDA seeded by `["job", client, job_id_le_bytes]`.
types.name: Job

docs: Unique identifier assigned from `AcpState.job_counter` at creation.
fields.name: job_id

docs: The party that created and funds the job.
fields.name: client

docs: The agent fulfilling the job. `Pubkey::default()` until set via `set_provider`.
fields.name: provider

docs: The adjudicator who completes or rejects. `Pubkey::default()` enables auto-complete on submit.
fields.name: evaluator

docs: Current lifecycle state (see `JobState`).
fields.name: state

docs: Token amount escrowed on fund. Zero for zero-budget jobs.
fields.name: budget_amount

docs: SPL mint for the budget. `None` until `set_budget` is called.
fields.name: budget_mint

docs: Human-readable description (max 256 bytes).
fields.name: description

docs: Unix timestamp after which the job may be claimed as expired.
fields.name: expired_at

docs: Unix timestamp of job creation.
fields.name: created_at

docs: Optional hook program invoked on before/after action callbacks.
fields.name: hook_address

docs: 32-byte hash/identifier of the work product, set on submit.
fields.name: deliverable

docs: 32-byte completion or rejection reason, set on complete/reject.
fields.name: completion_reason

docs: PDA bump for the per-job vault authority. Set during fund.
fields.name: vault_bump

docs: PDA bump seed for this job account.
fields.name: bump

docs: Emitted when a job is completed (evaluator approval or auto-complete).
types.name: JobCompleted

docs: Emitted when a new job is created via `create_job`.
types.name: JobCreated

docs: Emitted when an expired job is claimed via `claim_refund`.
types.name: JobExpired

docs: Emitted when a client funds a job, escrowing tokens in the vault.
types.name: JobFunded

docs: Emitted when a job is rejected by an evaluator, client, or provider.
types.name: JobRejected

docs: Job lifecycle states. Two valid paths exist (L-15):
Funded path:      Open -> Funded -> Submitted -> Completed | Rejected | Expired
Zero-budget path: Open -> Submitted -> Completed | Rejected  (budget_amount == 0)
Open jobs can also be Rejected directly by client or provider.
types.name: JobState

docs: Emitted when a provider submits a deliverable.
types.name: JobSubmitted

docs: Emitted when the net payment is transferred to the provider on completion.
types.name: PaymentReleased

docs: Emitted when the platform fee rate or treasury address is updated.
types.name: PlatformFeeUpdated

docs: Emitted when a provider is assigned to a job via `set_provider`.
types.name: ProviderSet

docs: Emitted when escrowed tokens are returned to the client (rejection or expiry).
types.name: Refunded
